positive: Minimalist geometric forest scene, featuring stylized silhouettes of various trees (oak, pine, birch) forming an intricate, repeating pattern. The composition should be centralized and symmetrical, with strong vertical elements. Use a highly contrasting palette of deep indigo blue and muted ochre yellow on a clean off-white background. The style should be vector-illustration quality, incorporating negative space and clean lines, suitable for screen printing on fabric. Overhead sunlight casts sharp, dramatic shadows through the branches, emphasizing the structural forms. Highly detailed, maximalist pattern design.
negative: blurry, noise, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, typography, copyright, signature, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, smudge, grain, poor composition, muted colors
